name: SDLC Assessment Rework Pipeline
description: Realistic software-delivery pipeline with one specialist assessment before release packaging.
outcome: An implemented change is assessed explicitly before release packaging continues.

definition.process_instructions: The solution architect defines the staged change and explicitly separates revision 1 from the rework scope. The implementation engineer follows the authored revision scope for the current delivery cycle and must not deliver rework-scope items early. The acceptance gate assessor evaluates the linked implementation output against the explicit assessment contract and requests changes when the linked subject only satisfies the initial revision scope. After one real rework cycle satisfies the rework completion scope, the assessor approves and the release operations coordinator packages the result.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

parameters.name: scenario_name
parameters.description: Stable scenario identifier that the CLI must echo in its assessment output

parameters.name: assessment_contract
parameters.description: Exact approval contract the acceptance assessor must enforce

parameters.name: initial_revision_scope
parameters.description: Explicit scope that the first implementation revision must stop at before assessment.

parameters.name: rework_completion_scope
parameters.description: Explicit scope that the reopened implementation revision must satisfy after request_changes.

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.

checkpoints.name: implementation
checkpoints.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
